     The Numbers Business Report

Nobody’s Fool (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,713,110Details
International Box Office $876,383
Worldwide Box Office $32,589,493
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,777,756
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,333,684
Total $4,111,440
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Trying to get back on her feet, wild child Tanya looks to her buttoned-up, by the book sister Danica to help her get back on track. As these polar opposites collide — with hilarious and sometimes disastrous results — Tanya discovers that Danica’s picture-perfect life — including her mysterious boyfriend — may not be what it seems.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,743,111 (43.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$19,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,468 opening theaters/2,468 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,634,339

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 2nd, 2018 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 23rd, 2018 (Limited), released as Nobody's Fool (United Kingdom)
January 18th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: January 29th, 2019 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for sexual content and language throughout, and for drug material.
(Rating bulletin 2543 (Cert #51764), 9/5/2018)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue
Plot point: African Americans, Catfishing, Dysfunctional Family, Internet Dating, Life on the Outside, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Stolen Identity
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tyler Perry Studios, Paramount Pictures, Paramount Players, BET Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

As these polar opposites collide — with hilarious and sometimes disastrous results — Tanya discovers that Danica’s picture-perfect life — including her mysterious boyfriend — may not be what it seems.
